svg.desc: SUPERSEDED — Violet-200 blockquote border color. DS §16 FLAG-005. Do not use as a build target. See DS §16 FLAG-005. Component: MarkdownContent — Markdown typography inside assistant chat bubbles Page: /sessions/:id (chat page, assistant message bubble) Design system version: 2.2 (2026-03-09) Artboards: desktop 1000px canvas (chat bubble focus, no sidebar/header context)

text.tspan: format that converts plain text into

g.text: It's widely used in technical documentation and chat interfaces.

text.tspan: for variable names and see the

g.text: Missing entries will cause silent failures.
This example demonstrates every markdown element that can appear in an assistant response bubble.
The analysis shows several key patterns in the data.

svg.text: Blockquote variant comparison — web_designer selects one
A uses rgba(245,243,255,0.4) — faint violet hue in the background. B uses #fafafa — fully neutral.
Both share the same border-l-2 #ddd6fe (violet-200) left accent. web_designer chooses A or B.

g.text: Color tokens used in this component
#f4f4f5 — zinc-100 — inline code bg / canvas bg
#fafafa — zinc-50 — code block bg, table header
